class.help: Administra los Motivos de cambios de estado del CV.
class.description: Motivo de Cambios de Estado del CV
class.label: Motivo de Cambio de Estado
class.name: MOT_CAMBIO

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_cambio as oi_mot_cambio, t0.c_mot_cambio as c_mot_cambio, t0.d_mot_cambio as d_mot_cambio, SEC.policy, t0.c_mot_cambio as CODE, t0.d_mot_cambio as TEXT FROM POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivoCamEstadoCV.MOT_CAMBIO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_cambio LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_cambio asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mot_cambio as oi_mot_cambio, SEC.policy FROM POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivoCamEstadoCV.MOT_CAMBIO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mot_cambio LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mot_cambio asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivoCamEstadoCV.MOT_CAMBIO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.MotivoCamEstadoCV.MOT_CAMBIO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS.oi_mot_cambio) as CNT from POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS.oi_mot_cambio={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS.d_mot_cambio,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS07_MOT_CAMBIOS.c_mot_cambio,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
